title: Raccoon Removal in Jericho, Long Island | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Jericho, NY. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900 – $4,000.
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Jericho's residential neighborhoods, attracted by accessible food sources and shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Our professional raccoon removal services provide humane, effective solutions to protect your Jericho property from structural damage and health risks. With extensive experience serving Long Island communities, we ensure safe removal and prevention strategies tailored to your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management expertise to Jericho residents, combining humane removal techniques with comprehensive exclusion services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties and provide same-day emergency response with guaranteed results.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined streets, proximity to wooded areas near the Jericho Preserve, and beautiful single-family homes create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Properties near Cantiague Park and the historic Jericho-Underhill area are particularly vulnerable to wildlife intrusions, especially during spring nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal services in Jericho typically range from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and necessary exclusion work. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my Jericho home?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause significant damage by tearing insulation, chewing electrical wiring, and contaminating areas with feces and urine that may carry diseases like raccoon roundworm and leptospirosis. They can also be aggressive when cornered, especially mothers protecting their young.

faqs.question: What is the raccoon removal process?
faqs.answer: Our process includes a thorough inspection to locate entry points and nesting areas, humane trapping and removal of all raccoons, cleaning and sanitizing contaminated spaces, repairing damage, and sealing all entry points to prevent re-entry. We also offer ongoing monitoring to ensure your home remains raccoon-free.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Jericho and surrounding Long Island areas. Once you contact us, we can typically have a licensed technician at your property within hours to assess the situation and begin the removal process.
